title: Transfer
description: Adds a /transfer command to transfer player to other servers.
body:
# Transfer Adds an Command to use the Transfer added in 23w03a. Introduces the `/transfer` command.
The syntax is `/transfer to `. Allows players to specify the target player, destination domain, and an optional port. The reciving server needs to have `accepts-transfers` set to true in the reciving server. This Mod does **NOT** work in Singleplayer!
